items.title: This Low-Mileage 2025 Tesla Model Y Lost A Lot Of Range Fast
items.summary: After 18 months and just over 13,000 miles, Tesla’s own battery-health test showed a result its owner called unacceptable.

items.title: This Simple Trick Boosted My Plug-In Hybrid's Fuel Economy To 50 MPG
items.summary: My Volvo wagon’s fuel economy was great to begin with, but a driving strategy change unlocked a new achievement.

items.title: Sodium Batteries And EVs That Power The Grid: Inside GM's Big Energy Push
items.summary: With sodium-ion batteries and vehicle-to-grid technology, General Motors' growth ambitions extend far beyond cars.

items.title: Yes, EVs Really Are Cleaner Than Gas Cars. Here's By How Much
items.summary: An MIT-led study found EVs usually beat gas cars on emissions, but the advantage varies sharply by location and driving habits.

items.title: The Rivian R2 Is Finally Here. The CEO Just Shared When To Expect More Models
items.summary: CEO RJ Scaringe hinted about how far around the corner R3 is and what could come next.

items.title: 'Really Impressed': Engineering Explained's Jason Fenske On Rivian R2
items.summary: On today's Plugged-In Podcast, we talk Rivian R2 driving impressions with Jason Fenske, of the YouTube channel Engineering Explained.

items.title: The Electric BMW M3 Is Coming. Here's What It Might Look Like
items.summary: It looks like a close-to-production preview of the production BMW i3 M, but the specs are still under wraps.

items.title: The Rivian R2 Is Now Shipping With A Rare Accessory The Competition Forgot Existed
items.summary: The R2 is billed as a relatively affordable adventure-ready EV. For an extra $755, owners can get some peace of mind.

items.title: Edmunds Has Owned A Volvo EX30 For A Year: ‘It’s Been Rough’
items.summary: After one year and roughly 8,000 miles, Edmunds’ staff concludes that the EX30 has been “a very frustrating car to live with.”

items.title: I Drove The 2027 Chevy Bolt. I Loved All The Storage Space But Its Cheap-Feeling Interior Was Underwhelming
items.summary: The 2027 Chevy Bolt has punchy acceleration, a great infotainment system, and a surprisingly spacious interior.

items.title: This Dodge Charger EV Prototype Packs An Experimental Semi-Solid-State Battery
items.summary: Dodge parent Stellantis is exploring the viability of semi-solid-state batteries with real-world testing. The test mule: A Charger EV.

items.title: China Loves This Cheap Battery Tech. Here's Why General Motors Might Not Stick With It
items.summary: LFP is the industry’s go-to cheap EV battery tech, but GM says another chemistry could offer similar cost benefits with fewer drawbacks.

items.title: BYD's New Hybrid Hatchback Could Supercharge Its European Takeover
items.summary: The Dolphin G DM-i PHEV is BYD's first car designed for Europe and made in Europe.

items.title: BYD Says It Will Be The World's Largest Automaker In 5 Years. The Pentagon Is Nervous
items.summary: As BYD vows to become the largest automaker, it must also defend against allegations that it has ties to the Chinese military.

items.title: BYD Is Bringing Thousands Of 5-Minute EV Chargers To Europe—And Canada Is Next
items.summary: BYD’s Flash Chargers can deliver up to 1,500 kilowatts of power to cars fitted with its latest Blade Battery.

items.title: The BMW iX3 Just Drove Over 500 Miles In A Demanding Real-World Range Test
items.summary: The long-wheelbase version of the iX3 tackled 6,500-foot altitude changes and near-freezing temperatures.

items.title: A YouTuber Debunked Donut Lab's Solid State Claims. It Reveals Something Huge About Lithium Batteries
items.summary: Donut Lab claimed to have made the world's first production-ready solid state battery. An in-depth investigation suggests otherwise.

items.title: Mercedes’ Smaller-Battery GLC EV Doesn’t Have A Range Problem
items.summary: Mercedes added two lower-priced electric GLC variants, and the rear-drive version still claims up to 404 miles of WLTP range.

items.title: Lucid's Top Engineer Departs The EV Startup As New CEO Takes Over
items.summary: Emad Dlala, Lucid's senior vice president of engineering and software, has left the company, TechCrunch reports.

items.title: ‘This Is The Biggest Fear For Me’: Toyota Chairman Admits He Isn’t Ready For The Electric Future
items.summary: Toyota says it's committed to solving the climate crisis. But the guy whose name is on the building doesn't seem to agree.
